---
name: Feature request
about: Propose an improvement to Casa
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## The problem

What founder or contributor problem does this solve? Describe the situation
where Casa falls short today.

## The proposal

What you want Casa to do. If it touches the command surface, name the command;
if it touches the engine, say which invariant it must respect (see
docs/ARCHITECTURE.md).

## Alternatives considered

Other ways to solve it, and why this one is better.

## Fit

- [ ] Keeps the zero-runtime-dependency rule
- [ ] Keeps deterministic code in charge of eligibility, gating, and state
- [ ] Adds no hosted service, telemetry, or payment machinery
